positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the home/dashboard page with session established
steps: Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the user is redirected to the home/dashboard page
Verify the authenticated user's name or profile indicator is visible on the page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login is successful regardless of email case, confirming case-insensitive email handling
steps: Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'TestD1051@Gmail.COM' in the username/email field (mixed case version of valid email)
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the user is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard/home page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with email address containing mixed case letters

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Appropriate validation error messages such as 'Email is required' and 'Password is required' are displayed, and login does not proceed
steps: Verify that validation error messages are displayed for both fields
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password fields

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Validation error such as 'Password is required' is displayed and the login attempt is blocked
steps: Verify that a validation error message is displayed for the password field
Verify the user remains on the login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username but empty password field
